tickets.title: Hello, Beaver Board!
tickets.description: Your first ticket. Move it to Done when you're done exploring.

tickets.title: Try starting an agent run
tickets.description:
Click on any ticket → Execution tab → pick a runner → click Start.

The agent will take over from here.

tickets.title: Attach evidence to this ticket
tickets.description:
Open the ticket drawer → Execution tab → Attach Evidence.

Evidence can include test results, screenshots, or a summary.

tickets.title: Add your first automation
tickets.description:
Project Settings → Automations tab → Add trigger.

Example: when a ticket moves to Done, post a message to team chat.
